name: docker-dashboard
description: A lightweight Docker container monitoring dashboard built with Hono, HTMX, Alpine.js, and Tailwind CSS.
author: Yoshin

scripts.dev: yarn setup-vendor && yarn build:css && tsx watch src/app.js
scripts.setup-vendor: mkdir -p public/vendor && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js public/vendor/htmx.js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js public/vendor/alpine.js
scripts.build: mkdir -p public/vendor && yarn setup-vendor && yarn build:css
